narrative:
Swanton Township has 1,836 registered voters, with 56.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.7%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.1 percentage points.
